text: AI is rapidly transforming the workplace. Automation handles repetitive tasks like data entry and scheduling, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools, such as smart email assistants and project management software, help teams work faster and make fewer mistakes. Instead of replacing humans entirely, the focus is on human-AI collaboration. For example, an AI might analyze sales data while a manager uses that insight to make strategic decisions. This shift is changing jobs—some roles may disappear, but new ones, like AI trainers and ethics officers, are emerging. Workers will need to adapt by learning new skills and embracing technology as a partner.
